title: HUD APPROVED FINANCIAL AND HOMEOWNERSHIP COUNSELING - 211info
text: WARM SPRINGS COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM HUD APPROVED FINANCIAL AND HOMEOWNERSHIP COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers HUD approved financial, credit, rental, and homeownership, counseling and coaching services. 1136 Paiute Avenue Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: People who live, work, or have addresses on the Warm Springs Indian Reservation Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Counseling by appointment only Email (541) 553-3148 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 553-3148 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: HUD Intake Form LANGUAGES: English AREA SERVED: Warm Springs Indian Reservation Services: Personal Financial Counseling Personal Financial Counseling * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNT COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - SMALL BUSINESS SUPPORT EMPLOYMENT - WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WARM SPRINGS COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM
